_meta.description: PAX trees for the trickster. Two branches; each path shares a universal trunk.

nodes.name: Damaged
nodes.desc: Damaging enemies with DAMAGE Skills increases your damage by 10% for 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Adaptation
nodes.desc: Activating Skills grants your 15% Anomaly Power or Firepower for 5 seconds depending which of them is higher.

nodes.name: Reactive Shielding
nodes.desc: Activating skills increases your Damage Mitigation by 5% for 6 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times.

nodes.name: Phasing
nodes.desc: Activating skills grants you 15% Shield and 10% Shield to allies.

nodes.name: Great Expanse
nodes.desc: Extend the distance considered as Close Range.

nodes.name: Quantum Entanglement
nodes.desc: All enemies in Close Range share 20% of your Weapon Damage.

nodes.name: Harrowing
nodes.desc: Increase your Reistance Piercing by 10%. Each enemy in Clsoe Range increases the bonus by 2% up to additional 10%.

nodes.name: Spectral Spike
nodes.desc: Damaging skills have a 100% chance to deal additional damage equal to 15% of your Anomaly Power. Consecutive triggers on the same enemy stack dealing more damage up to 750%.

nodes.name: Superposition
nodes.desc: Increase your Damage Mitigation against Elites by 20% during and for 3 seconds after using a MOVEMENT Skill.

nodes.name: Special Tactics
nodes.desc: Damaging Elites increases your damage against Elites by 3% for 3 seconds. Effect can occur once per second and stacks up to 10 times.

nodes.name: Triggerman
nodes.desc: Your damage is increased by 15% for each skill on cooldown.

nodes.name: Cheap Shot
nodes.desc: Your Class Melee skill lowers damaged enemy's Armor and Resistance by 30% for 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Lies, Deception
nodes.desc: Activating DECEPTION skills grants you 15% Shield every 1 second for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Fail-Safe Protocols
nodes.desc: When your Health drops below 30% get 50% Shield and 20% Damage mitigation for 3 seconds. Fail-Safe Protocols can be triggered every 10 seconds.

nodes.name: Rigged Game
nodes.desc: Activating skills increases your Critical Damage by 10% for 5 seconds. Stacks up to 2 times.

nodes.name: Infinity Slinger
nodes.desc: Sidearm Weapons do not consume ammo during and for 4 seconds after using a MOVEMENT Skill.

nodes.name: Power Overwhelming
nodes.desc: Increase your Firepower by 40% of your Anomaly Power when using an Assault Weapon.

nodes.name: Perpetuum Trickery
nodes.desc: Critical shots increase your Anomaly Power by 10% stacking up to 5 times. The stacks are consumed by the next DAMAGE skill you use. Activating a damage skill increases your Assault Weapon Daamge by 50% for 7 seconds.

nodes.name: Goals Beyond Understanding
nodes.desc: Damage done to Elites tagged with Deception skills has a 25% chance to be increased by 200%

nodes.name: Meticulous Schemer
nodes.desc: 200% of killing damage on enemies tagged with DECEPTION skills is divided amongst other tagged enemies.
